title: [FIRRTL] FModuleOp::getPort() is broken
body:
FModuleOp::getPort(size_t) seems to be implemented but it is neither used nor tested. It always crashes when calling `module.getPort(..)`. 
```
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/circt and include the crash backtrace.
 #0 0x0000000000747087 llvm::sys::PrintStackTrace(llvm::raw_ostream&, int) /scratch/hidetou/circt/llvm/llvm/lib/Support/Unix/Signals.inc:723:13
 #1 0x0000000000744fd0 llvm::sys::RunSignalHandlers() /scratch/hidetou/circt/llvm/llvm/lib/Support/Signals.cpp:106:18
 #2 0x00000000007479cf SignalHandler(int) /scratch/hidetou/circt/llvm/llvm/lib/Support/Unix/Signals.inc:413:1
 #3 0x00007f95e8c05cf0 __restore_rt (/lib64/libpthread.so.0+0x12cf0)
 #4 0x00007f95e7cbcaff raise (/lib64/libc.so.6+0x4eaff)
 #5 0x00007f95e7c8fea5 abort (/lib64/libc.so.6+0x21ea5)
 #6 0x00007f95e7c8fd79 _nl_load_domain.cold.0 (/lib64/libc.so.6+0x21d79)
 #7 0x00007f95e7cb5456 (/lib64/libc.so.6+0x47456)
 #8 0x0000000000aa0354 mlir::NamedAttribute::NamedAttribute(mlir::StringAttr, mlir::Attribute) /scratch/hidetou/circt/llvm/mlir/lib/IR/Attributes.cpp:46:3
 #9 0x0000000000cf4850 getPortImpl(circt::firrtl::FModuleLike, unsigned long) /scratch/hidetou/circt/lib/Dialect/FIRRTL/FIRRTLOps.cpp:579:11
#10 0x0000000000cf4762 circt::firrtl::FModuleOp::getPort(unsigned long) /scratch/hidetou/circt/lib/Dialect/FIRRTL/FIRRTLOps.cpp:589:3
```
